name: Agentic Core Skills
author: Agentic OS
description: Essential AI skills: summarize, explain, translate, classify, extract. The foundation pack.

skills.name: Explain Simply
skills.prompt: Explain this like I'm 12 years old: {{input}}

skills.name: Classify Intent
skills.prompt:
Classify the intent of: {{input}}
Output: one of [question, request, feedback, complaint, compliment]

skills.name: Extract Facts
skills.prompt: Extract all facts and key information as a bullet list from: {{input}}
